## Summary
Briefly describe the change and its motivation.

## Type of change
- [ ] New term(s)
- [ ] Axiom / modelling change
- [ ] Definition / annotation update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release

## Governance checklist (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] New/changed terms are grounded under an appropriate genus and assigned a `scon:module`
- [ ] New terms carry an `rdfs:label` and an `IAO:0000115` definition
- [ ] `scon:populationProvenance` set (author / reused / llm-proposed-human-approved)
- [ ] Ontology is **consistent under HermiT**
- [ ] No new OOPS! ERROR-level pitfalls
- [ ] Existing competency questions still pass
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
